name: opencomputer-runtime-deps
description: Project-local Node tools used by OC plugins (browser-harness uses agent-browser; opencli-bridge uses @jackwener/opencli).

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
✅ OC browser tooling installed:'); console.log('   • agent-browser  -> node_modules/.bin/agent-browser'); console.log('   • opencli        -> node_modules/.bin/opencli'); console.log('
First run only: ./node_modules/.bin/agent-browser install   (downloads Chromium, ~250 MB, one-time)
Then: oc chat
')"
